LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, DEC-01-2020 HEARING ON DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR AT THE REQUEST OF THE MOVING PARTIES (PER EMAIL DATED NOV-30-2020). (302/EPS)

LAW AND MOTION DEPT. 302 - DEFENDANT DONALD PUTERMAN, MARLA STURGES DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. PROPOSED SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT LODGED FOR FILING ON JANUARY 5, 2021. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS ADVISED THAT "[A] PARTY MAY AMEND ITS PLEADING ONCE WITHOUT LEAVE OF THE COURT" BEFORE A PENDING DEMURRER IS HEARD IF IT DOES SO NO LATER THAN THE DATE FOR FILING AN OPPOSITION TO THE DEMURRER. (CODE CIV. PROC. SEC. 472(A).) PLAINTIFF FAILED TO OBTAIN LEAVE OF COURT AS REQUIRED, WITH THE RESULT THAT THE PROPOSED SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT WAS REJECTED FOR FILING. TO AVOID UNNECESSARY PROCEEDINGS, HOWEVER, THE COURT WILL ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO FILE THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER GRANTING LEAVE TO FILE THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT AND MUST EMAIL IT TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG PRIOR TO THE HEARING. DEFENDANT MAY DEMUR TO THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT, AND NEED ONLY MEET AND CONFER WITH PLAINTIFF AS REQUIRED BY CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 430.41 AS TO ANY NEW CAUSES OF ACTIONS OR ALLEGATIONS IT MAY CONTAIN. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: PROCEEDING NOT REPORTED.

DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-20-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance is made in this matter.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT DONALD PUTERMAN, MARLA STURGES DEMURRER to First Amended COMPLAINT is Off calendar. Proposed second amended complaint lodged for filing on January 5, 2021. Plaintiff's counsel is advised that "[a] party may amend its pleading once without leave of the court" before a pending demurrer is heard if it does so no later than the date for filing an opposition to the demurrer. (Code Civ. Proc. sec. 472(a).) Plaintiff failed to obtain leave of court as required, with the result that the proposed second amended complaint was rejected for filing. To avoid unnecessary proceedings, however, the Court will allow plaintiff to file the second amended complaint. Counsel for plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order granting leave to file the second amended complaint and must email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the hearing. Defendant may demur to the second amended complaint, and need only meet and confer with plaintiff as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 430.41 as to any new causes of actions or allegations it may contain.

Written order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: proceeding not reported.

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-30-2020 Off Calendar
